classifications.native-node-22: A direct Node launch whose argv includes --experimental-strip-types before a TypeScript entrypoint.
classifications.powershell-bridge: A PowerShell caller that obtains argv from Get-OpkTypeScriptNodeArguments after the canonical runtime preflight.
classifications.historical-fixture-only: A non-live example, archived document, declaration, test, or fixture.
classifications.invalid: A live TypeScript launch that bypasses the Node 22 contract or selects compatibility machinery.
